---
title: Identifying enriched motifs in non-homologous UBC-upregulated genes
date: 2023-02-24
metadata-files: 
  - _metadata.yml
  - ../_quarto.yml
---

## Goal of this analysis

Same as 2023-02-15, fixed small bug in code script.


## Files and directories

### Code

See `<human Aldinger software directory>/​run_memes.R` and `<utilities>/​get_promoter_seqs.R`.

The only change from 2023-02-15 is the addition of the `outdir = ` parameter in the `runAme()` function call.

### Output

See `<human Aldinger results directory/20230224>` for figures, CSV, and log files.

Additional output files, such as `ame.html` and `sequences.tsv`, were also created since `outdir` was specified this time around.


## Results

No change from 2023-02-15 except for additional files that were generated.
